title: Add predict_proba, score, score_samples to GaussianMixture and BayesianGaussianMixture
description:
sklearn mixture models expose:
- predict_proba(X) → soft responsibilities (shape n_samples, n_components)
- score(X) → mean per-sample log-likelihood (returns scalar)
- score_samples(X) → per-sample log-likelihood (shape n_samples,)

ferrolearn currently has only Transform on these, which returns the responsibilities — but no explicit predict_proba and no log-likelihood scores. Add the three methods to FittedGaussianMixture and FittedBayesianGaussianMixture; reuse the existing E-step machinery.
